name: ledgerline
description: Agent-native composition with LedgerLine Studio, AI delegation, explicit score editing, rendering, mixing, and reversible review.

interface.shortDescription: Compose with Studio, AI delegation, and review
interface.longDescription: LedgerLine gives Codex a strict authored score language, an interactive Studio for piano roll, score, waveform, spectrum, mixer, and inspector review, plus AI delegation requests that become validated reversible edit proposals. It supports MPE and note-expression planning, semantic instrument profiles, SoundFont/SFZ/VST3/CLAP render boundaries, deterministic reference rendering, bus mixing, audio golden tests, licensed asset lineage, snapshots, and bundles.
defaultPrompt: Use $compose-music to open LedgerLine Studio and help me delegate a musical revision.
Ask my direction, compose a LedgerLine draft, then render and review it in Studio.
Process my Studio delegation request and return a reversible edit proposal.
